category_sources: Official OpenEXR documentation says it provides the specification and reference implementation of the EXR file format for motion picture imaging.
source_facts.description: High dynamic-range image file format
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is openexr and current_curation.display-name is openexr.
docs_sources: Official OpenEXR site provides Concepts, Tools, API, Python, and Install documentation.
Official repository README describes OpenEXR and links to the project documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/AcademySoftwareFoundation/openexr, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official OpenEXR documentation describes high-dynamic-range scene-linear image data, metadata, multi-part and multi-channel use cases.
source_facts.executables lists OpenEXR CLI tools such as exrheader, exrinfo, and exrmaketiled.
